name: GridLayout
description: Create responsive two-dimensional layouts using configurable grid columns, rows, and spacing.

as.description: Renders the grid container as a semantic HTML element instead of a div.

columns.description: Sets the grid column template as a count or CSS grid template string.

rows.description: Sets the grid row template as a count or CSS grid template string.

gap.description: Sets both row and column gaps when specific axis gaps are not provided.

columnGap.description: Sets the horizontal gap and overrides `gap` for columns when provided.

rowGap.description: Sets the vertical gap and overrides `gap` for rows when provided.

margin.description: Sets outer spacing around the grid container.

padding.description: Sets inner spacing within the grid container.

accessibility.role: varies by `as` element and page structure
aria: Use semantic HTML via `as` for page regions and landmarks
Apply ARIA attributes based on rendered element and surrounding pattern

inside: Content regions such as forms, dialogs, drawers, and dashboards
